title: Rebuild of Evangelion Complete Records Collection finally released in Italy
display_title: Rebuild of Evangelion Complete Records Collection finally released in Italy
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild of Evangelion Complete Records Collection finally released in Italy             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Nov 19, 2024 3:05 pm Hello, the localized version of the 1.0 and 2.0 CRC was announced almost 2 years ago and infinitely delayed (so you know it was an official Evangelion product), and it has now finally released in Italy. I am yet to get my copy delivered, but there is confirmation of what was expected: it's actually based on the 2019 softcover re-release, meaning that it does not include the storyboards and most importantly the interview section. The storyboards were published separately, but the interviews have not actually been re-printed in any format since the 2012 reprint of the original CRC books. 1.0 CRC IT  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Rebuild of Evangelion Complete Records Collection finally released in Italy             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Wed Nov 20, 2024 12:33 am Oh cool. I imagine this will make them very easy to translate. Thanks for reminding us, heh. EDIT: Wait, no interviews? Really? They have no plans to release them?

[]: Re: Rebuild of Evangelion Complete Records Collection finally released in Italy             Quote Post by Superblunt » Wed Nov 20, 2024 7:13 am Too bad it's not the interview parts. But either way, good for you. Here in Germany we haven't gotten anything Evangelion merch related since the mid 2000's. Anyway, I have the Japanese boxsets of the first two CRC's, desperately waiting for Groundworks to continue and release the third and fourth one already!!

[]: Re: Rebuild of Evangelion Complete Records Collection finally released in Italy             Quote Post by Joseki » Sun Nov 24, 2024 9:32 am FelipeFritschF wrote: EDIT: Wait, no interviews? Really? They have no plans to release them?

[]: Re: Rebuild of Evangelion Complete Records Collection finally released in Italy             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Nov 24, 2024 4:10 pm I imagine they will indeed be re-issued... in Japan, possibly in China, possibly in Korea. A western release seems unlikely, not at the least because it means translating a few hundred pages for what is a very niche market (not even just Eva itself, but the kind of people who care about the interviews specifically). There are so very few licensed translations of Eva material in the West, and usually they are very short texts as part of something bigger, so the precedent isn't very good.

I am yet to get my copy delivered, but there is confirmation of what was expected: it's actually base

A western release seems unlikely, not at the least because it means translating a few hundred pages for what is a very niche market (not even just Eva itself, but the kind of people who care about the interviews specifically). There are so very few licensed translations of Eva material in the West, and usually they are very short texts as part of something bigger, so the precedent isn't very good.
